owaspChecked: A03:2021 Injection — SQL template variables {{.QueryAgeThresh}} and {{.ShowNoIdle}}
A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration — hardcoded credentials, secret leakage
A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures — third-party deps

rationale.sqlInjection: Two template variables embed into SQL via text/template (no parameterization): QueryAgeThresh (literal in single-quoted interval) and ShowNoIdle (boolean gate, no string substitution). QueryAgeThresh is validated upstream by `parseHumanTimeString()` in top/config_view.go before reaching query.Format(). ShowNoIdle is a bool — no string content reaches the SQL. WHERE pid != pg_backend_pid() is a constant. No new injection surface vs. the pre-existing PgStatActivityDefault constant which uses the same template variables identically.
rationale.secrets: No credentials, tokens, or environment variables present in either file. SQL constant is static; test uses postgres.NewTestConnectVersion which sources config from the project test helper.
rationale.dependencies: Test file imports only `fmt`, `strings`, `testing` (stdlib), `github.com/lesovsky/pgcenter/internal/postgres`, and `github.com/stretchr/testify/assert` — all pre-existing project dependencies, no new third-party packages introduced.
